excerpt: The official programme page for MA in Anthropology lists 5th round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-01-31. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 1st round: 30 September 2025 2nd round: 31 October 2025 3rd round: 30 November 2025 4th round: 31 December 2025 5th round: 31 January 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis from October 2025 until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged. Applications submitted after 31 December 2025 may be considered, subject to availability of places.
